name: code-review-testing
tagline: Testing guidance for a Rust agent codebase: prefer integration tests, name unit tests *_tests.rs, reuse existing test helpers.
verdict: Short, safe, internally consistent testing guidance with no security concerns. Weak dispatch signal: the description is only three words with no trigger cues or scope exclusions, and the skill carries no version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: Description "Test authoring guidance" names the topic but gives no situations, verbs, or example phrasings for when to trigger it.
No "NOT for" or exclusion text anywhere in description or body.
Description is a 3-word fragment ("Test authoring guidance"), not even a full sentence — thin as a dispatch signal.
